title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Hiyori, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kawamatsu, Unknown person #4 as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You wouldn't think he's carrying a truck- load of weapons with him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where the heck even are we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I just have to follow the blood, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I think you were just picking off stragglers this whole time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, who was that large warrior monk?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, my footing here isn't the best. Must focus on--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know of no adult that puffs up like a blowfish like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are so many things I want to ask you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How did you end up here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After you left, I drifted, doing this and that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My feet eventually carried me here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If something ever happens to the princess, and I must end my own life,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is the place to do it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These Frosty Northern Reaches of Wano - Ringo and the neighboring Hakumai - were once both

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ruled by the fierce and powerful Shimotsuki clan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Daimyo of the clan was a man named USHimaru Shimotsuki. A master swordsman, who was always accompanied by his pet fox.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, Ringo too was turned into a wasted by the wrath of Kaido.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 37 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
